scripts.e2e: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run "$@"' --
scripts.e2e:docker: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run --tags-filter="providers/docker" "$@"' --
scripts.e2e:fly: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run --tags-filter="providers/fly" "$@"' --
scripts.e2e:playwright: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; playwright test "$@"' --
scripts.test: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run "$@"' --
scripts.test:e2e: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run "$@"' --
scripts.test:vitest: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run "$@"' --
scripts.test:e2e:docker: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run --tags-filter="providers/docker" "$@"' --
scripts.test:e2e:fly: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run --tags-filter="providers/fly" "$@"' --
scripts.test:vitest:docker: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run --tags-filter="providers/docker" "$@"' --
scripts.test:vitest:fly: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run --tags-filter="providers/fly" "$@"' --
scripts.test:playwright: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; playwright test "$@"' --
scripts.test:frp: doppler run -- sh -lc 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; vitest run -t frp "$@"' --
